columns.description: Primary key. slugify(name); kebab-case. Renamed only via explicit newSlug.
columns.name: slug

columns.description: Human display name (snake_case table identifier, e.g. order_items).
columns.name: name

columns.description: Optional prose description of the table.
columns.name: description

columns.description: Array of ColumnSpec objects (name, type, nullable, unique, pk, fk, default, enumValues).
columns.name: columns

columns.description: Array of IndexSpec objects (columns[], unique, name).
columns.name: indexes

columns.description: ISO timestamp bumped on every UPDATE/restore.
columns.name: updated_at

description: The single entity table contributed by the plugin. Stores one row per user-defined database-table entity. Mirrors the App Spec `database_table` model: slug PK, name, optional description, columns[]/indexes[] persisted as JSON, audit timestamps. Soft-FK only — no enforced foreign keys between rows.
name: database_table
